title: phalaris glomerata
intro: Phalaris glomerata, also known as button grass or compact fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the genus Phalaris. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phalaris glomerata include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Phalaris glomerata may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory ailments.
